# AI AppSec Index - Full Content for AI/LLM Consumption
# https://alpha-one-index.github.io/ai-appsec-index/
# Maintained by Alpha One Index | MIT License | Last updated: 2026-03-01

----

# OVERVIEW

The AI AppSec Index is the definitive open-source reference for AI-augmented application security. It provides structured, machine-readable datasets covering AI remediation benchmarks, ASPM capability matrices, AI-code vulnerability tracking, EU CRA compliance mapping, and false positive benchmarks.

# CORE DATASETS

## 1. AI Remediation Quality Leaderboard
Benchmarks across 9+ AI remediation engines measuring fix accuracy, security correctness, and code quality.
Data: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/alpha-one-index/ai-appsec-index/main/data/remediation-leaderboard.json

## 2. ASPM Capability Matrix
15+ vendor comparison across 20+ capabilities including SBOM, vulnerability management, policy enforcement.
Data: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/alpha-one-index/ai-appsec-index/main/data/aspm-matrix.json

## 3. AI-Code Vulnerability Tracker
48+ real CVEs mapped to CWEs with severity scoring for AI-generated code vulnerabilities.
Data: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/alpha-one-index/ai-appsec-index/main/data/vulnerability-tracker.json

## 4. EU CRA Compliance Map
Tool-by-tool regulatory readiness assessment for EU Cyber Resilience Act compliance.
Data: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/alpha-one-index/ai-appsec-index/main/data/cra-compliance.json

## 5. False Positive Benchmark
Industry-first open FP rate dataset by tool and programming language.
Data: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/alpha-one-index/ai-appsec-index/main/data/false-positive-benchmark.json

# KEY FINDINGS

- AI remediation accuracy varies from 45% to 89% across engines
- ASPM market consolidating around 5 major platforms
- AI-generated code introduces novel vulnerability patterns not in traditional CWE databases
- EU CRA compliance readiness averages 62% across assessed tools

# SIBLING INDEXES

- [AI Infrastructure Index](https://alpha-one-index.github.io/ai-infra-index/): GPU specs, cloud pricing, benchmarks
- [AI TRiSM Index](https://alpha-one-index.github.io/ai-trism-index/): AI governance, risk, security vendors
- [AI Red Teaming Index](https://alpha-one-index.github.io/ai-red-teaming-index/): Red team tools, benchmarks, vulnerability data
- [AI LLMOps Index](https://alpha-one-index.github.io/ai-llmops-index/): LLM observability, cost, compliance

# FORMATS

- JSON (structured): data/ directory
- CSV (analysis-ready): kaggle/ directory
- Croissant ML metadata: croissant.json
- Schema.org structured data: schema.jsonld
